It will imprint upon you. The art of good headline writing. The thing is what we all have, the human beings are nothing but a species of mammals who have been miswired. You know how I think it happened by the way? I think God is a prankster. I think that before we were born, we lived in heaven and we were just in ecstasy hanging out with God. God said, I'm going to make you all leave here and go to a place called earth. You will not remember heaven exactly except that you'll have this kind of vague yearning that you want to get back there. And how well you succeed in life and what a nice person you turn out to be determines whether you'll get back here or not. And just for the fun of it, I'm going to give you all a handicap. Not all of you will have the same handicap, but some of you, you know, we're just going to mix it up. And I've written all the handicaps on a little sheet of paper, a little piece of paper and I put it in this big basket. And I'm going to walk around and you put your paw in there and you pull out your handicap, you know, pull out your handicap. You will only have an IQ of 85. You guys say, well, that sort of sucks, but I guess it could be worth, you know, you will be born HIV positive. Ooh, that one sucks, you know. You will be born with a tendency toward alcoholism. You know, you will be born to redneck loser parents who tell you that you will never succeed in life. You know, there's some of these. The one that I would have hated to get worst of all, this is really true. There are two black girls in Los Angeles who are very intelligent. When I knew about them, they were college students and they were joined at the head. They had a thing that connected their heads like this. They were like a living black McDonald's arch. I don't mean to make fun of them because they were great, but wouldn't you hate to pull that one out of the hat? You said, you will be joined by the top of your head to your brother or sister. That would truly suck. So whenever you start thinking about the handicaps that God gave you, yours ain't the worst. But the point is we have all been miswired. All of us are screwed up. None of us have any sanity at all. We're all pursuing senseless endeavors and we're pursuing them stupidly. So just give in to it. I had a revelation walking on Collins Avenue and it's like God spoke to me and he said, it's all madness, Gary. Not only should you accept it, you must embrace it because there's nothing else. We are four to five billion lunatics. But to write a sales letter, to write a good headline, what you have to do is you have to imprint, neurological on your system, the process of writing good headlines. So what you do is you go through this collection of sales letters. I'm giving you probably the best collection in the world. And you write every single headline in there. Okay? Does the neural increasing work if you type stuff? Also or just if you can write? Yes, it does work if you type. However you normally write. You know, people are often astonished to find that I'm a fairly good typist but I don't type. I don't know why but it just doesn't work for me. I like writing better. But I don't think that you have to do that. Okay, here's the next thing you do. The next thing you do is you go through all of those letters. And you'll be able to shortcut this process because this is the prep work before you write your sales letter and you write every first sentence of those sales letters. Let me read to you what I believe is the best first sentence of a sales letter ever written. Dear friend, if you would like to lose up to 63 pounds comma, then here is how I did it in Japan and why I think you can do it in America. Dear friend, would you like a spare time money making business you could run from your home? If so, then let me tell you about 87 different home operated businesses owned by people here in Japan that are fantastically profitable and why I believe any one of them would make even more money in America. Essentially it's the same thing. You can see that these two are the same. So you go through and in your own handwriting you write every first sentence in there. Now, I don't think anybody here is going to in their own handwriting or own typing type every letter in that collection. I'm not asking you to do that. I'm asking you to write every headline and I'm asking you to write every first sentence. Then what I want you to do is go to the end of the letters, each of the letters where there is a call for action. Usually it is to buy the product and I want you to write out in your own handwriting every different call to action. This is crucial copy. It's crucial. Now, I don't want you to write what I'm saying because it's going to slow us down, but I'm going to tell you a couple of them. It's easy to order. All you have to do is write your name and address and the words wonder putter on a piece of paper and send it with your check for $39.95 plus $4 postage and handling per ends total $33.95 close per ends to Joe Blow 123 Elm Street, Massimo, Ohio 44646. Below that checks and money orders should be made payable to Joe Blow and company and it is not a good idea to send cash etc. That's one way of closing. I'll tell you another way of closing is to tell them they can call. It's easy to order. All you have to do is pick up your phone and dial 1-800-blah-blah-blah. By the way, that call is free. It won't cost you a dime. Close parentheses. Should we assume that they know that? No. Should you assume that an astronaut or a business executive knows it? No. No. But write in your own handwriting all of the calls to action, all of the ways to get the money. Now these are things that you have to do.
